product_name: Corolle Miss Floral Sweet Dreams Soft Doll
rating_source: Specialist or brand PDP; on-page review aggregate not published
rank_rationale: #1 over #2: clearest soft care doll; Blandine is rag-doll carry twin.
include_rationale: Copying real life at this age often starts with a soft body they can hug, carry and put to bed. Miss Floral keeps the doll light for sofa care games. Best when you want one soft doll that invites tuck in without a full bedroom set yet.

product_name: Corolle Rag Doll Blandine Sweet Dreams
rating_source: Specialist or brand PDP; on-page review aggregate not published
rank_rationale: #2 over #3: second Corolle soft body; bed props come next.
include_rationale: Some toddlers prefer a rag flop for dragging from room to room. Blandine keeps Corolle quality while limp limbs make carry simpler on short indoor trips. Choose when Miss Floral already sits on the shelf and you want a different soft care friend.

rating_source: Specialist or brand PDP; on-page review aggregate not published
rank_rationale: #3 over #4: clearest tuck in prop; cradles add rock.
include_rationale: Care play deepens when carry has somewhere to end. This Goki bed makes tuck in the point of the game without needing a full dolls house. Best once a soft doll already lives on the sofa and you want one prop that finishes bedtime copy.

rating_source: Specialist or brand PDP; on-page review aggregate not published
rank_rationale: #4 over #5: wood rock cradle; Tidlo is alternate rock form.
include_rationale: Rocking a cradle is a clear copy of real settle minutes. Bigjigs wood keeps the motion gentle enough for small hands. Choose when a flat dolls bed already seems done and you want rock and settle as the next care job.

rating_source: Specialist or brand PDP; on-page review aggregate not published
rank_rationale: #5: alternate wood cradle brand after Bigjigs.
include_rationale: If Bigjigs stock is thin, Tidlo still covers rock and settle with sturdy wood. The cradle keeps care play in one spot instead of endless carry. Useful as the fifth pick when soft dolls are sorted and you want a second wood cradle option with a different brand.
